subject: [PATCH v9 05/15] mm: add VM_UFFD_RWP VMA flag

2026-07-06.patch_summary: This patch adds a new VMA flag called VM_UFFD_RWP to extend userfaultfd protection from plain write-protection (WP) to full read-write protection. The flag is introduced as part of the preparatory work for userfaultfd read-write protection (RWP). The patch reserves the flag, adds helper functions, and updates the smaps
